title: Walmart Stores USA
description: Raw address reference dataset for US Walmart store locations. This is the upstream source from which assets/walmart-stores.json (the full app POI dataset) is derived.

items.title: WalmartStore
items.description: A single US Walmart store entry.

postal_code.description: US ZIP code of the store location (5 digits).

address.description: Full or partial street address of the store. When full, follows the format: '<street>, <city>, <state> <zip>'.
